title: XMiete Core Schema
description: A modular standard for digital rental deposits (BGB § 551 compliant).

name.description: Name of landlord or property management

actor.description: Entity that triggered the transition (e.g., TENANT, BANK, LANDLORD)

signature.description: JWS (JSON Web Signature) for non-repudiation of critical transitions.

installment_plan.description: Installment schedule when the tenant pays in tranches (BGB § 551 Abs. 2 allows up to 3). Each tranche accrues interest from its own paid_date, so schedule entries are the inputs to interest calculation.

total_installments.description: Number of equal installments. BGB § 551 Abs. 2 permits up to 3.

due_date.description: Contractual due date for this tranche.

paid_date.description: Actual payment date — absent if not yet paid. Used as the interest accrual start date for this tranche.

amount.description: Actual amount paid for this tranche.

is_confirmed_by_bank.description: Omit when unknown; false means explicitly not confirmed.

trusteeship.description: Trust account configuration per BGB § 551 Abs. 3 — insolvency-proof separation of deposit funds from the landlord's own assets.

account_type.description: Type of trust account structure. TREUHANDKONTO: standard segregated account. ANDERKONTO: restricted to licensed professionals (lawyers, notaries). POOLED_TREUHAND: multiple tenant deposits in one designated account with per-tenant sub-accounting.

trustee_entity.description: Full legal name of the trustee (Treuhänder) holding the funds — typically the bank or a licensed Hausverwaltung.

trust_account_iban.description: IBAN of the designated trust account, strictly separate from the landlord's own IBAN.

insolvency_protection_confirmed.description: Bank-confirmed insolvency-proof separation (insolvenzfeste Trennung) per BGB § 551 Abs. 3. Omit when unknown; false means explicitly not confirmed.

insolvency_protection_confirmed_date.description: ISO 8601 date on which the bank confirmed insolvency-proof separation.

statutory_basis.description: Statutory basis for the trust arrangement.

interest_rate.description: Current annual interest rate as a decimal (e.g. 0.015 for 1.5%). Banks must provide this when trusteeship is active — required to fulfill BGB § 551 Abs. 3 (interest belongs to tenant).

interest_rate_history.description: [Tenant transparency layer] Full history of rate changes, enabling tenants to independently verify accrued interest over the tenancy duration.

effective_to.description: Absent if this is the current rate.

accrued_interest.description: [Tenant transparency layer] Bank-calculated interest accrued to date. Informational snapshot — bank account statement governs legally. See interest_calculated_at for snapshot timestamp.

interest_calculated_at.description: [Tenant transparency layer] Timestamp when accrued_interest and total_balance were last calculated by the bank.

total_balance.description: [Tenant transparency layer] Principal + accrued_interest at interest_calculated_at. Represents the total amount the tenant is owed upon clean release.

provider.description: Information about the bank, insurer, or fintech platform providing the deposit.

executing_entity.description: The legal entity holding the funds or issuing the guarantee (e.g., Aareal Bank, Volksbank, Instabank).

brand_name.description: The brand or platform name facing the user (e.g., GetMomo, PlusForta, Smartmiete).

transport.description: Transport protocol configuration for bank-system communication. Defaults to REST; set protocol to EBICS for banks that use EBICS infrastructure.

protocol.description: Transport protocol used to exchange XMiete messages with the bank system.

utility_reservation.description: Records the portion of the deposit held back while the annual utility reconciliation is pending. The landlord releases most of the deposit at tenancy end and retains only this reservation. Once the utility statement arrives (billing_period_end + 12 months at the latest, per BGB § 556 Abs. 3), the reservation resolves: no shortfall closes the deposit; a shortfall enters the settlement flow as a UTILITY_ARREARS claim.

released_amount.description: Amount immediately returned to the tenant at tenancy end.

reserved_amount.description: Amount held back pending utility reconciliation. Typically 3–6 months of the monthly advance payment.

monthly_advance.description: Monthly utility advance payment — informational basis for the reservation size.

billing_period_end.description: End of the utility billing period the reservation covers.

resolution_deadline.description: Latest date for the utility statement (billing_period_end + 12 months). After this date the reservation must be released regardless.

settlement_ref.description: Reference to the utility statement document (document ID or URL).

actual_cost.description: Total utility cost for the billing period, as stated in the utility statement.

total_advance_paid.description: Total advance payments made by the tenant during the billing period.

resolved_at.description: Date the utility statement was submitted and the reservation resolved.

settlement.description: Structured settlement negotiation at tenancy end. Either party proposes an itemized split; the other accepts or counter-proposes. Inspired by UK TDS/DPS ADR, Australian RTBA joint-claim, and Swiss Mietkaution bilateral-release patterns.

handover_protocol_ref.description: Reference to the signed handover protocol (Übergabeprotokoll / check-out report).

category.description: COSMETIC_REPAIRS (Schönheitsreparaturen) are frequently unenforceable under German BGH case law — validate lease clause before asserting.

evidence_refs.description: URLs or document IDs: photos, invoices, contractor quotes, rent ledger.

response_deadline.description: 14-day response window, mirroring UK DPS and Australian RTA practice.

external_reference.description: Court or authority case number once escalated.

agreed_tenant_refund.description: Set on CLOSED — final amount returned to tenant.

agreed_landlord_retention.description: Set on CLOSED — final amount retained by landlord.

wallet_metadata.description: eIDAS 2.0 / EUDI-Wallet credential metadata for tenant identity verification.

issuer.description: Human-readable name of the credential issuer (e.g., 'Bundesdruckerei GmbH').

issuer_id.description: URI or DID identifying the credential issuer (e.g., 'https://pid.bundesdruckerei.de' or 'did:web:bundesdruckerei.de').

wallet_provider.description: Identifier of the EUDI Wallet provider app (e.g., 'bundesdruckerei', 'lissi', 'sprind').

credential_type.description: EUDI credential type: PID (Person Identification Data), EAA/QEAA (Electronic Attestation of Attributes), or MDL (mobile Driving License).

credential_format.description: Credential encoding format per OpenID4VCI / EUDI ARF.

assurance_level.description: eIDAS Level of Assurance per Article 8 of Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 as amended by eIDAS 2.0.

presentation_id.description: Opaque reference to the Verifiable Presentation submitted during verification.

issuing_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the credential issuer.

verified_at.description: Timestamp when the EUDI Wallet presentation was verified by the relying party.

expires_at.description: Expiry timestamp of the wallet credential.

deposit_pledge_attestation.description: QEAA credential schema for DepositPledgeAttestation — issued by a bank into the tenant's EUDI Wallet after deposit pledge. Format: SD-JWT (vc+sd-jwt). Governed by OpenID4VCI Pre-Authorized Code Flow.

deposit_id.description: XMiete deposit identifier that this credential attests.

deposit_amount.description: [Selectively Disclosed] Amount of the pledged deposit in euros.

pledge_date.description: ISO 8601 date on which the deposit was legally pledged.

pledged_until.description: [Selectively Disclosed] ISO 8601 date until which the pledge is in effect (typically end of tenancy).

statutory_basis.description: Statutory basis for the pledge (always revealed).

issuing_bank.description: Full legal name of the bank issuing the credential (e.g., 'Aareal Bank AG').

issuing_bank_id.description: URI or DID identifying the issuing bank (e.g., 'https://aareal.bank' or 'did:web:aareal.bank').

property_id.description: Optional opaque property or unit identifier from the landlord's system.

property_address.description: [Selectively Disclosed] Human-readable address of the rental property.

tenant_first_name.description: [Selectively Disclosed] First name of the tenant.

tenant_last_name.description: [Selectively Disclosed] Last name of the tenant.

credential_id.description: Globally unique credential identifier (maps to JWT 'jti' claim).

credential_format.description: Credential encoding format — always vc+sd-jwt for DepositPledgeAttestation.

assurance_level.description: eIDAS Level of Assurance — always 'high' for QEAA.

issuance_flow.description: OID4VCI grant type used for issuance.

status_uri.description: URL at which verifiers can check the current status (active/revoked) of this credential.

ebics_btf.description: EBICS 3.0 Business Transaction Format (BTF) — replaces order types from EBICS 2.x.

service_name.description: BTF service name (e.g., 'MCT' for SEPA Credit Transfer, 'STM' for statement/camt).

scope.description: BTF scope / country or region code (e.g., 'DE', 'EU').

ebics_metadata.description: EBICS connection parameters. Required when transport.protocol is EBICS.

host_id.description: EBICS Host ID configured at the bank (e.g., 'AAREAL01').

partner_id.description: EBICS Partner ID (Kundennummer assigned by the bank to the XMiete system operator).

user_id.description: EBICS User ID (technical user for the XMiete system).

ebics_version.description: EBICS protocol version. Use 3.0 for BTF-based order routing; 2.4/2.5 for legacy order types.

bank_url.description: HTTPS URL of the bank's EBICS server endpoint.

order_type.description: EBICS 2.x three-letter order type (e.g., 'CCT' for SEPA Credit Transfer, 'C54' for camt.054). Not used with EBICS 3.0; use btf instead.

signature_class.description: EBICS signature class: T (transport only), E (electronic/single), A (authorization/collective).

issuance_session.description: Tracks the state of an active OID4VCI issuance session for a deposit.

credential_offer_url.description: openid-credential-offer:// deep-link / QR payload for the tenant's wallet.

state.description: PENDING: offer issued, wallet has not yet fetched credential. CONSUMED: credential successfully issued. REVOKED: credential invalidated (deposit released/closed).

credential_id.description: Set after credential is issued; maps to DepositPledgeAttestation.credential_id.
